LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO RANCCORS' PERSONELL'S STATUS AS OFFICERS AND SHAREHOLDERS ARE ENTITLED TO MAKE AN ELECTION AS TO WORKER'S COMPENSATION COVERAGE UNDER LABOR CODE 3351.
